message:
feat(config): add tiered scrollback configuration (hot/warm budgeting)

Introduce ScrollbackTierConfig with enabled/hot_lines/warm_max_bytes
fields in the TerminalConfiguration trait, wire through config bridge,
and validate in terminal and WASM config tests. Disabled by default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
